headlines.headline: Holtum Asset Group announces $8.4B share buyback program

headlines.headline: Holtum Asset Group wins industry award for excellence in cloud infrastructure

sentiment.reasoning: Winning an industry award is a positive reputational signal but typically has a limited direct financial impact on the company's bottom line.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
